violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of tortillas being stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet clothes being sitting by the hand sink and not being stored in a sanitizing solution.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The ice machine in the back dry storage are needs to have the inside cleaned more thoroughly.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Gaskets on the reach in freezer need to be cleaned.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Leaking 3 compartment sink causing water to pool underneath.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Drop ceiling above the clean dish storage has water damage and is stained, surface is not non-absorbent.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in cooler, walk-in freezer and dry storage floors need to be cleaned more thoroughly.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Missing tiles under the racking in the dry storage area.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop stored in the mop sink was not placed in a position to properly dry.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
